creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
After upgrading to php5-5.2.7 (on different machines) applications like mediawiki-1.13.2, joomla-1.x and typo3-4.2.2. are broken with different error messages. After replacing php5-5.2.7 with php5-2.5.6_2 and manually installing php5-pcre-5.2.6_2 everything is fine again.

Joomla: pat-Error Missing 'condition' attribute for subtemplate in topmenu.html on line 19
Mediawiki: Warning: preg_replace() [function.preg-replace]: Internal pcre_fullinfo() error -3 in /var/www/vhosts/wiki.v-pe.de/mediawiki/includes/GlobalFunctions.php on line 208
Typo3: The page is not configured! [type= 0][]
